meta.description: IBKR pre-market research log. Appended each weekday run. Read by next run to detect changes.
meta.infra_warning: Every prior run of this routine (PRs #5,#6,#7,#8,#10,#13,#14) rebuilt memory/portfolio_log.json + scripts/premarket-research.js from scratch on a new throwaway branch because none of those PRs were ever merged to main. This run recovered state from PR #14 (branch claude/sweet-goodall-2p4fgs, 2026-07-01) instead of starting blind. Until ONE of these routine-infra PRs is merged to main, every future scheduled run will keep resetting. Recommend merging this PR (or #14) and closing the others as superseded.

positions.newsBias: BULLISH (REGAL AML trial at 78/80 events, unblind imminent)
NEUTRAL (lockup-fear headlines vs. investment-grade $25B bond close; $175.50 = 10% unlock trigger)

runs.notes: First tracked run (log was empty/never executed before today). CING is in the routine's ticker keyword list but is NOT currently held — that config is stale. IBKR Client Portal Gateway (localhost:5000) is unreachable in this sandbox; account/position/price data pulled directly from the connected IBKR MCP tools instead.

positions.newsBias: NEUTRAL/BEARISH (REGAL Phase 3 AML trial still at 78/80 events as of latest confirmed update June 24 — 80th event NOT yet reached, no readout date; SLS gave back most of its June run-up: $10.47 (6/26) -> $17.19 high (6/30) -> $13.05 close (7/1), likely profit-taking/de-risking ahead of the binary unblind rather than negative news)

flags.detail: -10.23% since last run ($14.67 -> $13.17); move occurred during the 7/1 session, not overnight

positions.newsBias: BEARISH-STABILIZING (SPCX round-tripped its post-IPO gains: fell ~24% from the $225 peak on bond-issuance/thin-float/lockup-fear headlines, closed 7/1 at $157.98, now roughly flat pre-market at $157.27; $175.50 = 10% insider-unlock trigger price, still well below; next scheduled unlock tied to first post-IPO earnings ~early-to-mid August, not imminent)

flags.detail: -9.58% since last run ($173.93 -> $157.27); move occurred during the 7/1 session, not overnight

runs.notes: NAV fell from EUR1,278.82 to EUR1,155.94 (-9.61%) day-over-day, driven entirely by the 7/1 intraday selloff in both holdings (SLS -10.2%, SPCX -9.6% vs the prior run's intraday quote) rather than fresh overnight catalysts — no confirmed SLS REGAL 80th-event readout and no new SPCX bond/lockup filing found in this run's news sweep. CING remains unheld; the routine's ticker/keyword config is still stale and should be reconciled or the ticker removed. IBKR Client Portal Gateway (localhost:5000) unreachable in this sandbox; all account/position/price data pulled directly from the connected IBKR MCP tools instead, matching the approach used in the prior run.
